title: Papa: RESEARCH BASE!
prompt: Wide mid-shot on the dry golden sand of @beach-shore. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME crouched gently on one knee in the sand with both arms relaxed at his sides, eyes lit up with cheerful warm dad-energy. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Sara already on his LEFT kneeling softly on the sand close to Papa, ponytail with bow, hands clasped softly in her lap, leaning in close. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already on his RIGHT kneeling softly on the sand close to Papa, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, hands clasped softly in her lap, leaning in close. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa gently spreads both arms out wide in a friendly dad-gesture like he's drawing a giant invisible castle in the air. Papa (cheerful warm theatrical dad-voice): "You know what every rescue mission needs? A RE-SEARCH. BASE!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara (eyes huge, mouth open in cheerful awe): "A research BASE?!" Eva (nodding fast, beaming bright): "Like real explorers!" Papa (warm cheerful nod): "Bucket. Shovel. Let's GO." Calm cheerful kid-show family energy throughout — no shouting, no scary intensity. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Papa stays in his crouched-on-one-knee position throughout. Both girls stay kneeling softly on the sand throughout — no leaping, no jumping. The sand stays plain clean golden sand — no marks, no red, no debris.
